exercises.title: See Thread Count
exercises.description: Run a multithreaded program and inspect its live threads with ps or top.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see the threads attached to the current process.

exercises.title: Race a Shared Counter
exercises.description: Write a tiny program where multiple threads increment the same counter without locking.
exercises.expected_outcome: The final count should sometimes be wrong or inconsistent.

exercises.title: Mutex Protected Counter
exercises.description: Fix the race by protecting the counter with a mutex or lock.
exercises.expected_outcome: The final count should be correct across repeated runs.

exercises.title: Producer-Consumer Queue
exercises.description: Build a bounded queue with a mutex and condition variables for producers and consumers.
exercises.expected_outcome: Producers block when the queue is full and consumers wake them back up.

exercises.title: Thread Pool
exercises.description: Implement a reusable thread pool with a work queue and graceful shutdown.
exercises.expected_outcome: Tasks run in parallel and the pool drains cleanly on shutdown.

exercises.title: Lock Contention Benchmark
exercises.description: Benchmark a shared lock under increasing thread counts and record throughput.
exercises.expected_outcome: Throughput should flatten or drop as contention rises.
